seo.title: BELO | Precyzyjne dzwonki dla marek globalnych
seo.description: BELO manufactures wireless RF, mechanical, self-powered and sensor doorbells for global B2B buyers.

hero.title: Precyzyjne dzwonki dla marek globalnych
hero.lead: BELO supplies wireless, self-powered, sensor and mechanical doorbells to importers, wholesalers and retail channels in 60+ countries.

products.label: Product categories
products.title: Doorbell product lines for B2B sourcing.
products.intro: Choose wireless RF, wired mechanical, self-powered or sensor doorbell solutions by market, voltage, channel and OEM requirements.

items.name: Wireless RF Doorbells
items.summary: 433.92MHz chimes with AC/DC options, 36 melodies and long-range receiving.

items.name: Wired Mechanical Chimes
items.summary: Classic ding-dong wired doorbells for 110V/220V markets and replacement channels.

items.name: Self-Powered Doorbells
items.summary: Battery-free kinetic transmitters for low-maintenance and eco-focused ranges.

items.name: Motion Sensor Doorbells
items.summary: Entrance sensor chimes for shops, service counters and commercial doors.

about.label: About BELO
about.title: A real doorbell factory supporting export-ready OEM programs.
about.text: BELO combines mold tooling, injection production, PCB support, packaging customization and export quality control to serve importers, brand owners and retail chains.

contact.label: Contact Us
contact.title: Send your doorbell sourcing request.
contact.text: Tell us your market, quantity, voltage, plug type, product range and OEM requirements.

footer.company: ZHONGSHAN BELO ELECTRONICS TECHNOLOGY CO., LTD
footer.tagline: Premium doorbell and electronics manufacturer since 1990.
